_purpose: Persistent cycle memory — tracks per-query-category hit rates, per-team coverage, empty cells flagged by the negative-space audit, and queries marked for auto-deprecation or auto-promotion. Read at the start of every cycle to prioritise underexplored areas.

Studio._note: Was 27 before 2026-04-29 cull; -3 (Wealth.com, Savvy Wealth, Vise — Series B/C reference architectures, removed)

Research._note: Was 21 before 2026-04-29 cull; -5 (Wealth.com / Savvy Wealth / Nayya / Willow Wealth stage-mismatch + Versus / Noise / Octen adjacency-mismatch). v4.8 stage and adjacency gates now applied pre-scoring.

multi_team._note: autonomous, mantic, astor, era — all dual-tagged Studio+Research. Sooth Labs retained as multi-team.

_calibration_2026_04_29.summary: Sweep added 16 cards; 8 culled as misfits. Pipeline 106 → 98.
_calibration_2026_04_29.lesson: Stage filter is HARD pre-scoring, no 'reference architecture' exception. Adjacency gate requires primary financial-services fit. Encoded in search-terms v4.8 Operating Instructions.
